arts.ttl: Gerrard set to leave role as Al Ettifaq manager
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard is set to leave his role as Al Ettifaq manager after 18 months in charge of the Saudi Arabian club.

arts.ttl: Al Shabab in advanced talks to sign Rennes midfielder Glen Kamara
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Saudi Pro League side Al Shabab are currently in advanced talks to sign Stade Rennais midfielder Glen Kamara (29). The former Leeds United…
